name: character_backgrounds
description: Character backgrounds for Five Parsecs from Home

backgrounds.name: Military
backgrounds.description: Former military personnel with combat training and discipline. Experienced in tactical operations and leadership.

special_abilities.name: Discipline
special_abilities.description: Can reroll one failed morale check per mission

backgrounds.name: Academic
backgrounds.description: Scholar or researcher with extensive knowledge in various fields. Skilled in analysis and problem-solving.

special_abilities.name: Research Expert
special_abilities.description: Gain +2 to all research and investigation checks

special_abilities.name: Knowledge Base
special_abilities.description: Can identify unknown items and technologies

backgrounds.name: Corporate
backgrounds.description: Former business executive or corporate agent with connections and negotiation skills.

special_abilities.name: Business Connections
special_abilities.description: Gain +1 to all trade and negotiation checks

backgrounds.name: Criminal
backgrounds.description: Former criminal with street smarts and survival instincts. Skilled in stealth and deception.

special_abilities.name: Street Smarts
special_abilities.description: Gain +1 to all social and deception checks

special_abilities.name: Criminal Network
special_abilities.description: Access to underworld information and contacts

backgrounds.name: Merchant
backgrounds.description: Trader or merchant with business acumen and negotiation skills. Experienced in trade and commerce.

special_abilities.name: Trade Expert
special_abilities.description: Gain +2 to all trade and commerce checks

special_abilities.name: Market Knowledge
special_abilities.description: Know current market prices and trends

backgrounds.name: Technician
backgrounds.description: Skilled technician or engineer with technical expertise and problem-solving abilities.

special_abilities.name: Technical Expert
special_abilities.description: Gain +2 to all technical and repair checks

special_abilities.name: Equipment Knowledge
special_abilities.description: Can identify and repair most equipment

backgrounds.name: Scout
backgrounds.description: Explorer or scout with wilderness survival skills and navigation expertise.

special_abilities.name: Wilderness Expert
special_abilities.description: Gain +2 to all survival and navigation checks

special_abilities.name: Scout Training
special_abilities.description: Can detect ambushes and hidden enemies

backgrounds.name: Medical
backgrounds.description: Doctor or medic with medical training and healing abilities. Skilled in treating injuries and illness.

special_abilities.name: Medical Expert
special_abilities.description: Gain +2 to all medical and healing checks
